recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father, a brilliant college student returns to his family home where he learns that the horrors from his childhood aren't as dead and gone as he once thought.

recommendations.title: Possum
recommendations.overview: A disgraced children's puppeteer returns to his childhood home and is forced to confront his wicked stepfather and the secrets that have tortured him his entire life.

recommendations.title: The Influence
recommendations.overview: After moving back to her family home to care for her dying mother, a nurse haunted by her childhood memories must struggle with an evil force in the house.

recommendations.title: Matriarch
recommendations.overview: Afflicted with a mysterious disease after surviving an overdose, a woman returns to her childhood home to confront her personal demons but instead discovers a real one.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: My Mother's Castle
recommendations.overview: To his chagrin, young Marcel Pagnol and his family move back to their home in Marseille, France, far from their pastoral holiday cottage in the hills. Determined, Marcel makes the long voyage back to the cottage on foot and lands himself in trouble.

recommendations.title: The Disappointments Room
recommendations.overview: A mother and her young son release unimaginable horrors from the attic of their rural dream home.

recommendations.title: R.L. Stine's Monsterville: The Cabinet of Souls
recommendations.overview: Teenage friends must resist the spell of an evil showman staging a house of horrors show in their small town.

recommendations.title: A Werewolf Boy
recommendations.overview: An unexpected phone call brings an elderly woman to her childhood country cottage, and memories of an orphan boy she knew 47 years ago come flooding back to her.

recommendations.title: Coming Home in the Dark
recommendations.overview: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.
